name: TVS Motor Company
description: Selected for the prestigious TVS Utkarsh Summer Internship Program. Built internal productivity tools including a Visitor Management System using Power Apps and a project tracking web application using Flask and JavaScript. These solutions streamlined internal workflows and improved operational visibility for teams.

name: Dell Technologies
description: Software Engineer building scalable automation and developer productivity tools using Python and microservices architecture. Developed solutions for secrets synchronization, CI/CD pipeline migrations, data lakehouse transfers, and AI-powered developer agents, reducing manual effort by up to 80% and improving engineering productivity by 25–40%.
